calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:14am

Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, California State Automobile Association Inter-Insurance Bureau present in pro per through Dan Beaulieu. Respondent, Ross Wilkinson present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman.

EXRA: P&A of Opposition to Appeal, photos, policy, letters; collectively marked.
EXA1: Brief

10:32AM
Exhibits Retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
